options.text: The Lower ECAM engine page or Cruise page.

options.text: Five minutes after the engine shutdown.

question: Which important safety procedure should be performed before any maintenance work on or near the ‘C’ ducts or reverser system?

options.text: Deactivate and pin the lever on the HCU.
Deactivate and pin the lever on the HCU and lock out translating sleeves.

sourceFile: 5. CFM56 Engine CAT B1 (135 Questions) R01.pdf
question: The oil tank content can be checked by?

options.text: Opening a dedicated servicing access panel in the LH fan cowl.
Opening an access panel on the LH “C’ duct.

question: How is the main cooling of the oil system achieved?

options.text: By a fuel cooled oil cooler in the HP fuel system.
By a fuel cooled oil cooler in the LP fuel system.

question: The FADEC automatically selects a continuous relight:

options.text: In case of Engine Interface Unit (EIU) failure only.
If engine anti-icing is detected ON or EIU failure or engine flame-out.
